name: samtools_view
description: Convert between SAM, BAM, and CRAM formats. Use this to filter reads, select regions, or convert file types.

args.format: Output format, e.g., -b for BAM, -C for CRAM.
args.extra_args: Any additional flags (e.g., -h, -q 20). Note: If converting to BAM, ensure -b is included.

name: samtools_sort
description: Sort alignments by leftmost coordinates or by read name.

args.extra_args: Any other flags (e.g., -n for sort by name).

name: samtools_index
description: Index a coordinate-sorted BAM or CRAM file for fast random access.
usage: samtools index -M [-bc] [-m INT] <in1.bam> <in2.bam> or samtools index [-bc] [-m INT] <in.bam> [out.index]

args.extra_args: Additional flags (e.g., -b for BAI format if needed).

name: samtools_faidx
description: Index/extract sequence from a FASTA file.

name: samtools_flagstat
description: Get statistics on the BAM file (e.g., number of mapped/unmapped reads).

args.output_file: Optional file to save statistics output.

name: samtools_fastq
description: Converts a SAM, BAM or CRAM to FASTQ format.
